tasks.subject: Task 1: Create Directory.Build.props
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add MSBuild plumbing that validates SecurityMode and propagates HARDENED_SECURITY define to all projects.

**Files:**
- Create: `Directory.Build.props`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Build with -p:SecurityMode=Standard succeeds
- [ ] Build with -p:SecurityMode=Hardened succeeds
- [ ] Build without SecurityMode fails with descriptive error
- [ ] HARDENED_SECURITY is defined when SecurityMode=Hardened

**Verify:** `dotnet build SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard` succeeds; `dotnet build SqlCli.slnx` fails with error

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Directory.Build.props"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Build with Standard succeeds", "Build with Hardened succeeds", "Build without SecurityMode fails with descriptive error"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Refactor ConfigLoader and wire up Program.cs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract EnsureConfigExists, CreateHardenedSecurity, LoadSecurityFromFile; add #if dispatcher and IsHardened const; call EnsureConfigExists from Program.cs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/SqlCli/Config/ConfigLoader.cs`
- Modify: `src/SqlCli/Program.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] EnsureConfigExists creates default config when no file exists
- [ ] LoadSecurityFromFile loads from combined and split config
- [ ] CreateHardenedSecurity returns SelectStatement-only config
- [ ] LoadSecurity dispatches correctly via #if
- [ ] IsHardened const reflects build mode
- [ ] Program.cs calls EnsureConfigExists before Load* methods

**Verify:** `dotnet build SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/SqlCli/Config/ConfigLoader.cs", "src/SqlCli/Program.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EnsureConfigExists works", "LoadSecurityFromFile works", "CreateHardenedSecurity returns correct values", "#if dispatcher works", "IsHardened const correct"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update tests for refactored ConfigLoader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update existing tests and add new tests for CreateHardenedSecurity, LoadSecurityFromFile, and EnsureConfigExists.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/SqlCli.Tests/Config/ConfigLoaderTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All existing test scenarios still covered
- [ ] CreateHardenedSecurity returns expected values
- [ ] LoadSecurityFromFile loads from combined and split configs
- [ ] LoadSecurityFromFile returns safe defaults when no file found
- [ ] EnsureConfigExists creates config when none exists
- [ ] EnsureConfigExists is a no-op when config exists

**Verify:** `dotnet test SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard` all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/SqlCli.Tests/Config/ConfigLoaderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All tests pass", "New tests for EnsureConfigExists", "New tests for CreateHardenedSecurity", "New tests for LoadSecurityFromFile"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update config comment and AgentHelp
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update security section ConfigComment to explain both modes, and update AgentHelp to output current security mode.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/SqlCli/Config/SqlCliConfig.cs`
- Modify: `src/SqlCli/AgentHelp.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Generated config includes Standard/Hardened mode explanation
- [ ] --agent-help output includes current security mode
- [ ] Agent help explains config file behavior per mode

**Verify:** `dotnet test SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard` all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/SqlCli/Config/SqlCliConfig.cs", "src/SqlCli/AgentHelp.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Config comment explains both modes", "AgentHelp shows security mode", "AgentHelp explains mode behavior"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update CI and README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add -p:SecurityMode=Standard to CI build/test steps and document SecurityMode in README.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.github/workflows/build.yml`
- Modify: `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CI build step passes SecurityMode=Standard
- [ ] CI test step passes SecurityMode=Standard
- [ ] README documents both security modes
- [ ] README build instructions include SecurityMode

**Verify:** `dotnet build SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/build.yml", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CI passes SecurityMode", "README documents SecurityMode"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify the complete feature works end-to-end in both modes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] dotnet build with SecurityMode=Standard succeeds
- [ ] dotnet build with SecurityMode=Hardened succeeds
- [ ] dotnet build without SecurityMode fails with descriptive error
- [ ] dotnet test with SecurityMode=Standard passes
- [ ] dotnet test with SecurityMode=Hardened passes

**Verify:** All build/test commands above produce expected results

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Standard && dotnet test SqlCli.slnx -p:SecurityMode=Hardened", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Standard builds and tests pass", "Hardened builds and tests pass", "Missing SecurityMode fails"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
